description: Karaite agreement regarding the lease of a perfume shop. Dated 28 Tevet 5425 AM (1665 CE). Moshe b. Shemuʾel Ḥazan leases the shop to Yeshuʿa b. Mordekhay Rofe for a weekly rate of 35 medin, or roughly 140 medin/month and 1,680 medin/year. The agreement was signed by four witnesses and Moshe as a consenting party. The witness Barukh Rofe was likely the scribe, given the volume of documents he issued in the 1660s-1680s: e.g. Yevr.-Arab. II 1556 (PGPID 28020), Yevr.-Arab. II 1576 (PGPID 28037), Yevr.-Arab. II 1622 (PGPID 28059), among many others. MCD.
description_he: הסכם קראי לחכירת חנות בשמים. תאריך: כ"ח טבת 5425 = 1665 לספירה. משה ב' שמואל חזן מחכיר את החנות לישועה ב' מרדכי רופא בתעריף שבועי של 35 מדין. נחתם על ידי ארבעה עדים ומשה כצד מסכים.
